Brawler.desc: Brawlers are monstrous fighters in battle that deal a lot damage.
Brawler.Knight: A loyal knight of the Kingdom that is promised a promotion to Royalty.
Brawler.Alpha: Alpha becomes a lot more fierceful with the pack.
Brawler.Viking: Viking is a relentless force that weakens attackers and strikes lightning.
Brawler.Basilisk: Basilisk strives in long term battles poisoning opponents.
Brawler.Warrior: Warrior is holy champion blessed by the heavens.
Brawler.Slayer: Slayer is unmatched in raw strength.
Brawler.Challenger: Challenger is a master duelist that weakens a souls.
Brawler.Shaman: Shaman is a mystical combatant that casts dark magics.
Brawler.Vampire: Vampire drains the lifeforce of their opponents.
Brawler.Alchemist: Alchemist is a master of brews that crafts arcane potions.
Brawler.Wrath: Wrath overwhelms all opposition when Enraged.

Duelist.desc: Specialises in aggressive playstyles to outplay an opponent.
Duelist.Fisherman: Fisherman can teleport hooked enemies to them or may leap forward on marked location.
Duelist.Bomber: Bomber causes devastating area damage with explosives.
Duelist.Ninja: Ninja is a shadow assassin that teleports behind targets.
Duelist.Monkey: Monkey is a trickster whom has mastered the art of confusion.
Duelist.Hyper: Hyper is an agile scout that gains immense speed.
Duelist.Rogue: Rogue is a master of stealth and strikes harder from the back.
Duelist.Phoenix: Phoenix is a soaring bird of fire with endless dashes.
Duelist.Pirate: Pirate excels at plundering by dominating his area.
Duelist.Remnant: Remnant lingers between life and death.

Ranged.desc: Damage opponents from afar whilst keeping your distance.
Ranged.Inferno: Inferno shoots flaming arrows that sets opponents ablaze.
Ranged.Scout: Scout is a lethal archer that suffocates their prey.
Ranged.Artillery: Artillery has impeccable damage but has to be careful.
Ranged.Snowman: Snowman slows opponents and is quick on their feet.
Ranged.Wisp: Wisp is a spectral archer that is extremely lethal.

Tank.desc: Endure brutal amounts of unimaginable damage.
Tank.Star: Star is a celestial titan that stuns nearby players to restore health.
Tank.Dragon: Dragon is a legendary combatant whom blasts targets aflame.
Tank.Hedgehog: Hedgehog is extremely resilient that reflects melee damage.
Tank.Juggernaut: Juggernaut is a massive giant that gains permanent health for every takedown.
Tank.Behemoth: Behemoth is an ungodly titan that gains resistance as its health drops.
